dialogue_text: It was not I who did it, it was love, love for Dejah Thoris, a power that would work greater miracles than this you have seen.
source_excerpt: "The answer is easy, Dejah Thoris," I replied smiling. "It was not I who did it, it was love, love for Dejah Thoris, a power that would work greater miracles than this you have seen."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
